bodyText:
What is company registration consultant? Expert company registration consultant — Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC, Section 8, Nidhi Company. End-to-end MCA filing support.
Company Registration Consultant is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Andaman and Nicobar Islands since 2012.
Quick Answer: Company Registration in Andaman and Nicobar Islands — Expert company registration consultant — Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC, Section 8, Nidhi Company. End-to-end MCA. From ₹5,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Company Registration Consultant in Andaman and Nicobar Islands
Virtual Auditor provides company registration consultant across Andaman and Nicobar Islands. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Andaman and Nicobar Islands with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Chennai handles company registrations and filings for Andaman and Nicobar Islands. Stamp duty: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: Which entity type is best for my business?
faqs.a: Pvt Ltd for funding, LLP for professionals, OPC for solo entrepreneurs, Section 8 for non-profit. We advise based on your specific goals.

faqs.q: What is the cheapest company to register?
faqs.a: Sole proprietorship (₹0 registration fee) or LLP (from ₹5,999). Pvt Ltd from ₹8,999 all-inclusive.

faqs.q: Can NRIs register a company in India?
faqs.a: Yes. NRIs can be directors and shareholders. At least one director must be an Indian resident (182+ days in India).

faqs.q: Do you provide company registration services in Andaman and Nicobar Islands?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Andaman and Nicobar Islands from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Andaman and Nicobar Islands?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Andaman and Nicobar Islands fall under ROC Chennai. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Andaman and Nicobar Islands-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Andaman and Nicobar Islands?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Andaman and Nicobar Islands: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
